notes:
🚀 v33.6 - In-App Updater & Location Fixes

✅ FIXED: In-App Updater now correctly identifies and installs new versions (dynamic naming).
✅ FIXED: Native error handling during installation (permissions & logs).
✅ FIXED: Location permissions restored for Android 12+ (SSID visibility).
✅ NEW: 'Open App Settings' button when WiFi SSID is hidden.
